message:
test(wave-87): add trait coverage for gf2, codegen, outcome, no_aliasing

BitVec (Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Hash), PersistencePairs (Debug, Clone),
GeneratedMessage (Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq), CompilationError (Debug, Clone),
Severity (Debug, Clone, Copy, Hash), PanicPayload (Debug, Clone, PartialEq),
Lemma (Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq),
ViolationKind (Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq). 8 new tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
